c.d: Number of unique users who actively engage with the app within a 30-day period
c.s: App store analytics, Sensor Tower, App Annie, developer reports

c.d: Average rating score given by users on app stores, typically on a 1-5 scale
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

c.d: Total number of app installations across all platforms since launch
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, third-party analytics platforms

c.d: Monthly gross revenue generated through in-app purchases, advertisements, and subscriptions
c.s: Sensor Tower, App Annie, developer financial reports

c.d: Combined social media mentions, shares, and community discussions across platforms
c.s: Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, YouTube, TikTok, gaming forums
